user.title: Set up Zentraly
user.description: Enter the credentials for your Zentraly account.

device.title: Select thermostats
device.description: Choose one or more thermostats to add. Already configured devices are hidden.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Zentraly API. Check your network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

init.title: Zentraly options
init.description: Lower polling reduces WiFi load on the thermostat. Proactive reset reboots the device every 11 hours to avoid a known Azure IoT token bug — only enable if devices go offline after ~12 hours.
